'''Horch''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who was the leader of the [[Kheedar Ring/Legends|Kheedar Ring]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kheedar]]. When the planet was attacked by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], his [[Horch's palace|palace]] was targeted due to the presence of laser emplacements.<ref name="GG9" />

[[Noval Garaint]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], attacked his palace soon afterward. The Crime Lord was swiftly apprehended along with all of his lieutenants. Horch of Kheedar was then propped up by Noval Garaint as a figurehead for the crime syndicate that he'd formerly controlled. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War's]] height, Horch had voluntarily ceded all of his power and control and was merely a pawn for Noval Garaint. He spent all of his time getting drunk on [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Alcohol/Legends|liquor]] rather than running his empire.<ref name="GG9" />
